summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by removing the frontend-side role guard from useDeleteMember (it now calls actor.deleteMember directly), adding useIsCallerAdmin with staleTime/retry for reliable admin status caching, and gating the AdminPanel behind an admin-status check. The backend main.mo is modified (truncated, so full details not visible). A migration.mo file is added. Overall the fix appears well-targeted at the described bug.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend role check for deleteMember correctly validates admin principal/role before rejecting the request.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and the deleteMember function body is not visible. We cannot confirm that the backend-side admin role check for deleteMember was fixed or is correct. The summary in frontend-file-summaries.txt only describes frontend changes to useDeleteMember.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo file was added with a migration module and run function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to fix the admin delete permission check. Adding a data migration module was not requested.
